title: What Is Going on With Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) Stock Today?
text: Intuitive Surgical (NASDAQ: ISRG ) stock is rising higher on Tuesday after entering into an accelerated share repurchase agreement. According to a filing with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), it's agreed to buy back $1 billion worth of ISRG stock from Citibank.

title: Intuitive Surgical stock rallies more than 10% following earnings beat

Intuitive Surgical shares rose more than 12% to an intraday high of $220.98 Wednesday Late Tuesday, the company reported third-quarter net income of $324 million, or 90 cents a share, compared with $380.5 million, or $1.04 a share, in the year-ago period.
